scenarios.description: children() recomputes filtered list after childNodes change invalidates cache
scenarios.expectedResult: Initial children() returns empty; after appendChild, children() returns list with the new Element
pseudocode: TEST TC06 children recompute after mutation
Elements first = el.children();      // populates shadowChildrenRef with empty list
el.appendChild(new Element("span")); // triggers onContentsChanged -> shadowChildrenRef cleared

scenarios.description: children() short-circuits to empty when all elements removed, even if cache was previously populated
scenarios.expectedResult: After empty(), children() returns empty list without loop
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children empty after removal
el.appendChild(li);               // initial list has one element
el.empty();                       // removes all childNodes and triggers nodelistChanged
